history.content:
<thought>
Estou no centro inferior da visão. A célula à frente parece ser lava ou perigosa na linha acima, então não devo avançar. A melhor opção é girar para procurar um caminho seguro em direção ao objetivo O visível à direita.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
O objetivo O está visível à esquerda, mas há lava logo acima e também à esquerda em uma das células próximas, então avançar agora pode ser perigoso. Vou girar para buscar um caminho seguro ao redor da lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
O objetivo O está visível à frente e à direita em relação ao meu quadro atual, mas a célula imediatamente à frente continua sendo lava, então não posso seguir em frente com segurança. Vou girar para alinhar-me com o corredor livre que leva ao objetivo.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Ainda vejo o objetivo O à esquerda no campo local, mas a frente está bloqueada por lava, então não é seguro avançar. A melhor opção imediata é continuar girando para procurar uma direção livre para contornar os perigos.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing a layout where the goal is visible ahead-right, but the cell directly in front is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. Since the previous turn did not change the blockage, I should rotate clockwise to explore the safe path toward the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The local map shows I am in the same position relative to the visible goal area. The cell ahead is still not safe, so I should keep turning to face a free direction rather than stepping into danger.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I can no longer see the goal, but the cell directly in front of me is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. I should rotate to find an open direction; clockwise is a reasonable next step to keep searching the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
There is lava directly in front of me, so I must not move forward. The only apparent safe option is to turn to avoid the lava and look for a path around it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible ahead and to the right. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I cannot go forward. I should turn to face a safe direction that lets me advance toward the open path and goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up. The cell in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal O is visible to my left, and there is an open floor path on that side. I should turn counter-clockwise to head toward the goal corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. Turning clockwise will reorient me toward the open safe floor to continue toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing upward with a wall directly ahead, so I cannot go forward. The goal is visible to my left, and the open path toward it is along that side. I will turn counter-clockwise to face the goal direction.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible to my right, but the cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. I should rotate counter-clockwise to face the safe corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
There is lava directly in front of me, so I cannot move forward. The safest available action is to turn clockwise to reassess the path around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible ahead-right. I am facing toward a lava cell directly in front, so I should avoid moving forward into danger. Rotating counter-clockwise should reorient me toward the safe open cell path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>
